comment: 38yo female with macrocephaly (occipitofrontal circumference 59 cm, ≥97th percentile for adult women) + characteristic mucocutaneous papillomas (multiple trichilemmomas on face, acral keratoses on hands, papillomatous papules in oral cavity) + multinodular goiter on US. Meets revised Cleveland Clinic / NCCN Cowden clinical diagnostic criteria via pathognomonic mucocutaneous findings + macrocephaly + thyroid pathology. No current cancer diagnosis. Engine fires RF-COWDEN-FAMILY-HISTORY-SUSPICION via clinical-diagnostic-criteria branch and routes to PreventionPlan: standard = IND-COWDEN-SUSPICION-PREVENTION-GENETIC-COUNSELING (pre-test counseling + germline PTEN panel); alternative = IND-COWDEN-SUSPICION-PREVENTION-ENHANCED-SURVEILLANCE (empirical multi-organ Cowden-style surveillance if patient declines testing). Distinct from existing COWDEN-PREV-001 (35yo) — older age cohort, more developed papilloma phenotype.
